name: inventory_glm_updated
command: python -c "from aho.council.inventory import inventory; m = inventory(); glm = next((x for x in m if 'glm' in x.name.lower() or 'evaluator' in x.name.lower()), None); print(f'glm={glm.status if glm else None}')"
actual_output: glm=gap: parsing logic converts real reviews to rubber stamps

name: no_new_baseline_regressions
command: python -c "from aho.acceptance import baseline_regression_check, run_check; r = run_check(baseline_regression_check()); print('baseline-stable' if r.passed else r.actual_output)"
